paper_title: MLQA: Evaluating Cross-lingual Extractive Question Answering
evaluation_method: Extractive QA following SQuAD format. Model must extract answer span from context passage. Evaluated using standard SQuAD metrics: F1 (token overlap between predicted and gold answer) and Exact Match (binary, predicted answer matches gold exactly). Cross-lingual evaluation across 7 languages (English, Arabic, German, Spanish, Hindi, Vietnamese, Chinese).
